creator: rm@gnu.org
text:
I just updated gcc7 to gcc7-devel-7.2.1.s20170824

But it still segfaults 
Compiling file GSString.m ...
In file included from GSString.m:44:0:
../Headers/Foundation/NSKeyedArchiver.h:563:1: internal compiler error: Segmentation fault
 - (void) encodePoint: (NSPoint)aPoint forKey: (NSString*)aKey;
 ^
no stack trace because unwind library not available
